locators.label: TSOT26 outline and suggested pad layout
Current family identity, TSOT26 package, specifications, and technical documents

pins.name: FB
pins.function: Senses the regulated output; the AP63205 variant regulates this node to the fixed 5 V output.

pins.name: EN
pins.function: Digital enable and programmable input undervoltage threshold input.

pins.name: VIN
pins.function: Input supply for the IC and integrated converter switches.

pins.name: SW
pins.function: Power switching node feeding the output LC filter.

pins.name: BST
pins.function: Bootstrap supply input for the high-side gate drive.

ratings.name: recommended input voltage
ratings.qualifier: Recommended operating range; not the absolute maximum.

ratings.name: fixed output voltage
ratings.qualifier: CCM electrical characteristic across the stated datasheet conditions.

ratings.name: continuous output current
ratings.qualifier: Device headline rating; board capability still depends on the inductor, copper, thermal path, input conditions, and validation.

ratings.name: quiescent current
ratings.qualifier: VEN open and VFB at 1.0 V under the stated test condition.

land_pattern.locator: page 17, TSOT26 suggested pad layout; X=0.70 mm, Y=1.00 mm, C=0.95 mm, and Y1=3.20 mm
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Component centroid is (0,0); +x is right and +y is down in the top-view footprint; pin 1 is upper-left; pins increase counter-clockwise.

symbol.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
symbol.provenance: Original Lyon Industries native symbol serialized from the reviewed exact-MPN pin map.
limitations: The single-unit functional block prioritizes explicit pin names and electrical types over a stylized circuit symbol.

footprint.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
footprint.provenance: Original Lyon Industries native footprint serialized from the manufacturer land pattern and explicit reviewed pad coordinates.
limitations: Assembly-process solder-paste adjustments remain the responsibility of the consuming PCB design.

step_model.provenance: Original Lyon Industries nominal envelope model generated from the manufacturer body, height, terminal-span, and pad geometry.
limitations: The model is authoritative for nominal seating and clearance envelope only; it omits undocumented cosmetic, internal, and lead-form detail.

orientation.description: The top-view pin order and identification mark are documented; tape-pocket orientation requires the current package-orientation source.

notes: Moisture sensitivity is listed as Level 1 per J-STD-020.
The datasheet recommends 2 oz copper and close placement of the input and feedback components for the 2 A layout case.

findings.summary: A generated custom footprint used about 1.9 mm lead pitch where this package requires 0.95 mm pitch; ordinary PCB clearance checks did not detect the package mismatch.
A completed route passed native geometry checks while placing the input capacitor and switching paths too far from the converter for the datasheet layout intent.

checks.name: source identity and hash
checks.method: Captured the current official 18-page PDF and recorded its SHA-256.

checks.name: pin map
checks.method: Compared the top-view assignment, pin table, and typical circuit.

checks.name: package dimensions
checks.method: Compared package pitch and suggested-pad labels with the TSOT26 drawing.

checks.name: independent product and package cross-check
checks.method: Compared the normalized exact or family identity, package code, pin count, and current manufacturer status against the official product page independently of the datasheet extraction.

checks.name: explicit land-pattern arithmetic
checks.method: Converted the manufacturer contact pitch, row spacing, pad width, and pad length into centroid coordinates, then independently recomputed adjacent pitch, symmetry, and pad count.

checks.name: native symbol pin-map verification
checks.method: Parsed the generated KiCad symbol and compared every pin number, name, and electrical type with the normalized exact-MPN pin map.

checks.name: native footprint geometry verification
checks.method: Parsed every KiCad pad number, centroid, and size; compared them with the explicit manufacturer-derived land-pattern record; inspected the top-view pad plot, pin-one mark, fabrication outline, and courtyard.

checks.name: STEP placement and envelope verification
checks.method: Reopened the STEP file with CadQuery/Open CASCADE, confirmed solid count, board-plane seating at z=0, manufacturer height, body envelope, lead span, pin-one feature, and visually inspected an isometric tessellation.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization and previews based on the linked official source.
